name: He-man's Tuna Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Green Bell Pepper, Fine Chop
recipeInstructions:
Cook noodles in salted water; drain. Coat with butter.
Preheat oven to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C).
In a large saucepan, mix soup, milk, sour cream, salt, onion, pimiento,
pepper, and celery. Cook over low heat, stirring frequently for 15 minutes.
Add tuna.
Combine with noodles and pour into 2-quart casserole dish.
Sprinkle top with Ritz crackers (1 cup). Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
Remove from oven and garnish with parsley before serving.
